into_the_wild.name: St. Stephen's Green
into_the_wild.description: A lovely urban park in the heart of Dublin city center with scenic views and a peaceful seagull pond. Perfect for relaxing and enjoying the greenery amid the bustling city.

into_the_wild.name: Howth
into_the_wild.description: A coastal town near Dublin with highly recommended hiking trails that offer amazing views and the opportunity to explore a charming seaside village afterward. Absolutely worth visiting for outdoor enthusiasts.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Samuel Beckett Bridge
gram_worthy_spots.description: An iconic Dublin bridge with beautiful lighting displays that are particularly striking at night. One of Dublin's favorite photogenic landmarks.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Dublin from the International Station
gram_worthy_spots.description: A viewpoint offering stunning aerial views of the entire Dublin cityscape with zero clouds on clear days. Fascinating perspective of the city at scale.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Aungier Street
gram_worthy_spots.description: A Dublin street location that transforms into an oil painting-like scene during rainy weather, offering unique photographic opportunities worthy of Monet.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Sandymount
gram_worthy_spots.description: A charming Dublin neighborhood known for street art and local character, offering glimpses of community spirit and hopeful messages throughout the area.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Dublin City Centre on Christmas Day
off_the_beaten_path.description: Experience the peaceful, quiet beauty of Dublin's city center on Christmas Day when the crowds are gone, offering a unique and serene perspective of the city.
